final:
module RefModule (
    input wire S,
    input wire R,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    always @(S or R) begin
        if (S && !R) begin
            Q = 1;
            Qn = 0;
        end else if (!S && R) begin
            Q = 0;
            Qn = 1;
        end else if (!S && !R) begin
            Q = Q; // retain previous state
            Qn = Qn; // retain previous state
        end else begin
            Q = 1'bx; // invalid state
            Qn = 1'bx; // invalid state
        end
    end
endmodule
